name: I'm on a ridge above a ravine
description: I'm on a ridge above a ravine
hints: The opposite side of the ravine from room 8. You jumped across.
W leads to a mountain trail. JUMP RAVI jumps back across.
The mountain trail leads to a line shack with hidden areas.
W=mountain trail (32). JUMP RAVI returns to ridge (8).
notes: Far ridge. W=mountain trail (32). JUMP RAVI=back to other ridge (8).
